name: @aily-project/board-metro_esp32s3
description: The Adafruit Metro ESP32-S3 is a Metro-form-factor development board based on the ESP32-S3 with dual-core 240 MHz processor, 16 MB Flash, 8 MB PSRAM, native USB, Wi-Fi, BLE 5.0, LiPoly battery charging, microSD slot, and STEMMA QT connector.
description_en: The Adafruit Metro ESP32-S3 is a Metro-form-factor development board based on the ESP32-S3 with dual-core 240 MHz processor, 16 MB Flash, 8 MB PSRAM, native USB, Wi-Fi, BLE 5.0, LiPoly battery charging, microSD slot, and STEMMA QT connector.
description_zh_cn: Adafruit Metro ESP32-S3 是一款基于 ESP32-S3 的 Metro 外形开发板，搭载双核 240 MHz 处理器、16 MB Flash、8 MB PSRAM、原生 USB、Wi-Fi、BLE 5.0、锂电池充电、microSD 卡槽和 STEMMA QT 连接器。
author: Adafruit
